message:
chore: dependency updates and continued terminal_guard refinements

Cargo.toml:
- Dependency version updates

terminal_guard.rs:
- Continued refinements to ftui-based terminal size query

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ required-features = ["cli"]
 default = ["cli", "daemon", "sqlite"]
 cli = ["dep:clap", "dep:clap_complete", "dep:colored", "dep:crossterm", "sqlite", "daemon"]
 daemon = ["dep:signal-hook"]
-tui = ["dep:ftui-core", "dep:ftui-tty", "cli"]
+tui = ["dep:ftui-core", "dep:ftui-backend", "dep:ftui-tty", "cli"]
 sqlite = ["dep:rusqlite"]
 
 [dependencies]
@@ -40,6 +40,7 @@ rusqlite = { version = "0.33", features = ["bundled", "functions"], optional = t
 thiserror = "2.0"
 # TUI (optional — gated behind "tui" feature)
 ftui-core = { path = "/dp/frankentui/crates/ftui-core", optional = true }
+ftui-backend = { path = "/dp/frankentui/crates/ftui-backend", optional = true }
 ftui-tty = { path = "/dp/frankentui/crates/ftui-tty", optional = true }
 # Timestamps (core)
 chrono = { version = "0.4", default-features = false, features = ["clock", "serde"] }
